app.name: Magic Mind Reader
title: Magic Mind Reader
subtitle: Think of a number between 1 and 31. Let the magic guess it!
question: Is your number here?
result_message: The number you have in mind is
about_desc: Magic Mind Reader is a gamified application that employs a binary-search mathematical card trick. The user is asked to think of any integer between 1 and 31. By answering 5 simple Yes/No questions as cards are presented, the magic engine correctly identifies and reveals the chosen number.
